title: Calendar View customization and adjust tasks to show estimated time
excerpt: When using the Calendar view for my items in the daily or weekly view, an item can be moved around and dragged to different days and times, but the item is set as a half hour time block.  It’d be great if I could drag th…

posts.author: keames (K.C. Eames)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using the Calendar view for my items in the daily or weekly view, an item can be moved around and dragged to different days and times, but the item is set as a half hour time block. It’d be great if I could drag the item to cover a different amount of time to reflect how much time it will actually take - to mimic how Outlook allows you to drag / expand / shrink appointments. That way I could allocate tasks across my day with a more accurate assessment of how long it’s going to take me to complete everything.

Also, could the Calendar view have more options such as setting the view for my set work hours only, and expanding the y-axis to show the day in 10- or 15-minute increments, similar to Outlook?

posts.author: sydney (Sydney Céspedes)
posts.cookedHtml: this would be SO helpful, we are using the board to track schedules for process tasks, this feels like an easy fix, would really love to see this soon!

posts.author: adibar (adi)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, time slot is indeed missing in this overview!
